message:
🧹 Replace ~50 raw time expressions with shared constants from lib/constants/time.ts (#10225)

Fixes #10224

Replaces raw `N * 60 * 1000` expressions across 27 production files with
MS_PER_MINUTE, MS_PER_HOUR, and MS_PER_DAY from the shared constants
module introduced in PR #10148. Removes locally-redefined MS_PER_HOUR
constants in favor of the canonical import.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
